title: Meetings; prohibited without notice
doc_html:
Rule 13.75. Meetings; prohibited without notice

No meeting of a committee, regularly scheduled or otherwise, shall be held unless there is full compliance with the requirements of Senate Rules 13.73 and 13.74.
